title: GlobalScanMethod
description: Contract for global.scan JSON-RPC method. Starts a read-only global skills scan; progress arrives via operation.progress notifications.

GlobalScanResponse.title: GlobalScanResponse
GlobalScanResponse.description: Immediate response — the scan runs asynchronously. Errors: conflict_error (1005) if a scan is already running.

operationId.description: ID of the created scan operation
